---
title: "Rmd Notebooks Manual Check"
output: html_document
---

This file exists so the Extension Development Host opens with a minimal document set.

```{r first}
x <- 1
x + 1
```

```{r htmler}
rmd_notebooks_html("<strong>hello from rmd</strong>")
```

```{r second}
summary(cars)
```

```{r plotter}
plot(cars)
```
